home.hero_subtitle: Empowering Indian families to recognize, resist, and report digital threats.
home.features_subtitle: Master the tools and knowledge needed to protect yourself and your family.
home.feat1_desc: Bite-sized lessons on phishing, OTP frauds & social engineering — tailored to the Indian context.
home.feat2_desc: Test your instincts against simulated scam messages, emails & calls in a safe environment.
home.feat3_desc: Track emerging scam trends in your region and stay one step ahead with live community data.
home.showcase_desc: Experience our high-production-value video modules designed to educate every Indian household about digital safety through immersive storytelling and cinematic visuals.
home.showcase_feat1_d: See how scams happen in everyday life.
home.showcase_feat2_d: Control the narrative and learn at your own pace.

learn.title: Learning Modules
learn.subtitle: Master cyber defense strategies through interactive lessons.
learn.mod_phish_d: Learn how scammers trick you into revealing sensitive information through deceptive messages.
learn.mod_otp_d: Understand how bank impersonators steal your money using One Time Passwords.
learn.mod_job_d: Identify fraudulent work-from-home offers and foreign job placements.
learn.mod_soc_d: Protect yourself from cloned accounts asking for money in emergencies.

dash.upi_scams_d: Of all financial crimes are UPI-based

scanner.title: AI Scam Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Upload a screenshot of a suspicious message, email, or profile for instant AI analysis.
scanner.upload_desc: Drag and drop or click to select image (PNG, JPG)

report.title: Report a Cyber Threat
report.subtitle: Help us keep the community safe. Report suspicious messages, fake websites, or potential scams. Your report is anonymous and helps train our systems.
report.form_desc: Provide as much information as possible about the suspicious activity.
report.link_desc: If the scammer sent a link, paste it here.
report.content_placeholder: Paste the exact message received or describe what happened...
report.success_desc: Thank you for contributing to CyberAngel. Your report helps protect others from falling victim to similar scams.

dashboard.intel_subtitle: Real-time threat intelligence and personal safety progress.
dashboard.intensity_desc: Visualizing reported scam volume across major categories.
dashboard.hotline_desc: Tap to report financial cybercrime immediately

signup.join_desc: Protect your family's digital world today
signup.verify_desc: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone
signup.terms: By joining, you agree to our

trainer.menu_subtitle: Fun, bite-sized games to help you spot digital dangers instantly.
trainer.trainer_desc: Click on the suspicious parts of the message.

learn_ui.lookalike_desc: Scammers use 'arnazon.com' instead of 'amazon.com'. Always double check every letter.
learn_ui.pressure_desc: If it says your bank account is "Blocked" and you must act in 5 mins, it's likely a scam.
learn_ui.upload_placeholder: Upload an image to see the AI analysis breakdown here.
